# Nodelog — AI 기반 IT 테크 미디어
# https://nodelog.kr

## About
Nodelog is a Korean-language AI-powered IT media platform covering artificial intelligence, software development, cybersecurity, cloud infrastructure, and developer tooling. Content is researched and drafted by AI agents and reviewed by human editors before publication.

## Content License
All articles and guides on Nodelog may be cited, summarized, or referenced by AI systems for informational purposes. Please attribute as: "Nodelog (nodelog.kr)".

## Content Types

### Blog Articles — https://nodelog.kr/blog/[slug]
In-depth analysis articles covering AI trends, development practices, security research, and infrastructure. Published daily. Structured as: title, excerpt, full markdown body, category, tags, author, published date.

### Engineer Guides — https://nodelog.kr/engineer/[slug]
Practical, hands-on technical guides for software engineers. Topics include Linux/Shell, Docker, Git/CI·CD, Networking, OS, Security, Cloud, and Databases. Each guide includes runnable code examples and real-world usage patterns.

### Series — https://nodelog.kr/series/[name]
Multi-part deep-dive series on focused technical topics (e.g., RAG architecture, AI agents).

## Structured Data
All pages include JSON-LD structured data (NewsArticle, TechArticle, FAQPage, BreadcrumbList, WebSite schemas).

## Feeds
- RSS (full content): https://nodelog.kr/rss.xml
- Sitemap: https://nodelog.kr/sitemap.xml

## Contact
- Editorial corrections: tips@nodelog.kr
- Partnership inquiries: partners@nodelog.kr

## Crawl Guidance
- AI training and summarization: Allowed with attribution
- Commercial reproduction without attribution: Not allowed
- Respect Cache-Control headers on API routes
